The largest planet in the Pyro system, Pyro V has a striking atmosphere swirled with shades of green and yellow.

This innermost moon of Pyro V is covered in deep canyons and dried riverbeds. No other signs of water remain on its desiccated surface.

Situated at a strategic location near the Pyro-Nyx jump point, the Gateway station provides shops and services to those traveling to and from the system. Visitors to the station can find a wide variety of amenities and stores including: Refueling, Restocking, Cargo Transfers, Supplies, Habs, and more.

Situated at a strategic location near the Pyro-Stanton jump point, and considered by many to be the last bastion of civilization in the system, the Stanton Gateway provides shops and services to those traveling to and from the system. Visitors to the station can find a wide variety of amenities and stores including: Refueling, Restocking, Cargo Transfers, Supplies, Habs, and more.

Located at the L4 Lagrange point of Pyro II, this dilapidated station was originally established by Pyrotechnic Amalgamated to supply their workers with fuel and other resources. Today, the fierce Rough & Ready gang uses the station to offer outlaws traveling the system a place to stop for fuel, supplies, and a bit of entertainment. Just be sure to mind your manners.

From repairing your ship to grabbing a snack, the independently owned Starlight Service Station at the L1 Lagrange of Pyro III offers everything your vehicle and crew needs on your journey through the system.

Whether your hull’s full of holes, your quantum tank’s drier than an overcooked aloprat, or you need a place to sleep one off, head over to Patch City at Pyro III’s L3 Lagrange and the Rough & Ready gang will get you fixed up and back on your way. If you have the credits that is.

Situated high above Pyro III, Orbituary station is the domain of the Rough & Ready gang who operate the refueling services for outlaws and civilians alike. While a convenient place to stock up and get a night’s rest, make sure you don’t let your guard down.
Pyro’s Rough, so you better get Ready. Stop by this station for fuel, supplies, and a bit of entertainment. Just be sure to mind your manners.
You need fuel? Supplies? Rod’s got it!
Pyro’s Rough, so you better get Ready. Stop by this station for fuel, supplies, and a bit of entertainment. Just be sure to mind your manners.
Pyro’s Rough, so you better get Ready. Stop by this station for fuel, supplies, and a bit of entertainment. Just be sure to mind your manners.
The Dudley family’s been working hard to provide quality refueling services for over a decade. Come by to experience the Dudley Difference.
The only refueling station in Pyro good enough to be called Megumi.

A Gold Horizon platform orbiting Pyro VI. It was owned and operated by Pyrotechnic Amalgamated until it was abandoned and then overrun by outlaws. Feuds between factions have lead to frequent and deadly battles; making this location extremely dangerous for civilians and outlaws alike.
